short_blurb: Residential and commercial roofing across Torrance.
local_note: Torrance's large mix of post-war tract homes, Hollywood Riviera hillside properties, and the industrial/commercial corridor along Western Avenue gives us steady work in both residential and commercial roofing. Many 1950s-era homes here are now on their second or third re-roof — we handle the full tear-off and deck repair that often comes with these projects.
